headline: AT&T launches 4 new internet plans amid fight for customers
summary: AT&T has refreshed its internet plan lineup amid intensifying competition in the broadband industry. While AT&T welcomed 584,000 new internet customers in the first quarter of 2026, according to its most recent earnings report, T-Mobile attracted over 500,000 and Verizon gained 341,000. In ...

headline: AT&T Copper Thefts Test Network Resilience And Capital Allocation Priorities
summary: AT&T, traded as NYSE:T, is reporting a surge in copper thefts that is affecting parts of its network infrastructure. The company is tying the spike to higher copper values and rising demand from AI data centers. In response, AT&T has announced a significant public reward aimed at deterring theft and supporting investigations. AT&T is facing a very physical problem at a time when attention is often on its digital services, with copper thefts creating fresh pressure on its operations. The...
